superresolution.screen.config.name: Super Resolution Configuration
superresolution.screen.info.name: Information
superresolution.name: Super Resolution
superresolution.common_requirement.not_s:
The OpenGL version does not meet the requirements
Required version: %s.%s
Actual version: %s.%s

The necessary OpenGL extension is missing
Missing extension: %s
superresolution.screen.button.tooltip.ap: Save the configuration without closing this interface
superresolution.screen.button.tooltip.cl: Close this interface without saving the configuration
superresolution.screen.button.tooltip.do: Close this interface and save the configuration
superresolution.screen.config.options.to: When enabled, the selected algorithm will be used to perform super resolution on the image

Higher values result in lower rendering resolution (blurrier visuals) but reduce performance cost
Lower values result in higher rendering resolution (sharper visuals) but increase performance cost
Current rendering resolution: %sx%s
Current rendering precision: %s
Recommended value: 1.4 to 1.8

Lower values make object edges more distinct
Higher values blur distant objects
Recommended value: around 0.55
superresolution.algo.not_support.fsr1: Your OpenGL version is below 4.3. FSR1-related features will be automatically disabled.
superresolution.algo.not_support.none: If you see this message, it means the idiot developer's code has a bug
superresolution.algo.not_support.fsr2: Your GPU lacks required OpenGL extensions. FSR2-related features will be automatically disabled.
superresolution.algo.not_support.nis: Your OpenGL version is below 4.5, or you lack required OpenGL/Vulkan extensions. NVIDIA Image Scaling features will be automatically disabled.
superresolution.screen.info.button.label: OpenGL Extension Information
superresolution.screen.config.options.to: Development environment only, enable RenderDoc integration
Development environment only, enable debug overlay
superresolution.screen.config.warn.mobil: Warning: Running on mobile device, this mod's mobile support is unstable and may cause unexpected issues
superresolution.algo.description.header:
FSR1 --- AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution 1
FSR2 --- AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution 2
NIS --- NVIDIA Image Scaling
SGSR --- Snapdragon™ Game Super Resolution
superresolution.screen.config.warn.algor: Warning: Current algorithm is incomplete and non-functional
superresolution.screen.config.options.to: Skipping native libraries may cause malfunctions
Skipping Vulkan init may affect some algorithms
superresolution.screen.info.text.open_so: We hereby express our gratitude to the authors and contributors of the following open-source libraries. Without their development of these libraries, this mod would not exist.
superresolution.screen.config.special.fs: Enabling can improve performance but may slightly reduce visual quality
superresolution.screen.config.special.sg:
CS_2 - Compute Shader/2-pass
Moderate performance, Balanced quality

CS_3 - Compute Shader/3-pass
Lower performance, Best quality

FS_2 - Fragment Shader/2-pass
Best performance, Lower quality
